mapper.select: SELECT cr.id AS roomId, CASE WHEN cr.user_one = #{myId} THEN cr.user_two ELSE cr.user_one END AS partnerId, u.nickname AS partnerNickname, u.profile_image AS partnerProfileImg, (SELECT cm2.message FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm2 WHERE cm2.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY cm2.send_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastMessage, DATE_FORMAT( (SELECT cm3.send_date FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm3 WHERE cm3.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY cm3.send_date DESC LIMIT 1), '%H:%i') AS lastTime, SUM(CASE WHEN cm.sender_id != #{myId} AND cm.is_read = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreadCount FROM CHAT_ROOM cr JOIN `user` u ON u.id = CASE WHEN cr.user_one = #{myId} THEN cr.user_two ELSE cr.user_one END LEFT JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE cm ON cm.room_id = cr.id WHERE cr.user_one = #{myId} OR cr.user_two = #{myId} GROUP BY cr.id, u.id, u.nickname, u.profile_image ORDER BY MAX(cm.send_date) DESC
SELECT id FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE (user_one = #{userOne} AND user_two = #{userTwo}) OR (user_one = #{userTwo} AND user_two = #{userOne}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM (user_one, user_two, create_date) VALUES (#{userOne}, #{userTwo}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT cm.id, cm.room_id AS roomId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, cm.message, cm.is_read AS isRead, DATE_FORMAT(cm.send_date, '%H:%i') AS sendDate, u.nickname AS senderNickname, u.profile_image AS senderProfileImg FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm JOIN `user` u ON u.id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.send_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE (room_id, sender_id, message, is_read, send_date) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{message}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm JOIN CHAT_ROOM cr ON cm.room_id = cr.id WHERE (cr.user_one = #{myId} OR cr.user_two = #{myId}) AND cm.sender_id != #{myId} AND cm.is_read = 0
